This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] #1 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #3 Reinitialize the default imports
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt"
[FAIL] #4 Test that WebAssembly compilation succeeds (load0.wast:3)
  assert_true: WebAssembly.compile failed unexpectedly with TypeError: Cannot convert 10 to a BigInt at {loc} expected true got false
[FAIL] #5 Test that WebAssembly instantiation succeeds
  assert_true: unexpected instantiation error, observed TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'source') \n    at instance (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/harness/async_index.js:207:15)\n    at load0_wast_js (http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/load0.wast.js:7:10)\n    at http://web-platform.test:8001/wasm/core/js/multi-memory/load0.wast.js:15:3 expected true got false
[FAIL] #6 Test that a WebAssembly code returns a specific result (load0.wast:18)
